name: Peanut Butter Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package Vanilla pudding/pie filling (4-serving size, instant)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, blend the pudding mix, sour cream, and milk until smooth.
2. Place the peanut butter chips and vegetable oil in a microwave-safe bowl.
3. Microwave at HIGH for 1 minute, stirring after the first minute.
4. If necessary, continue microwaving at HIGH for an additional 15 seconds or until the mixture is melted and smooth when stirred.
5. Gradually add the melted peanut butter mixture to the pudding, stirring on high speed of an electric mixer until smooth.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared crust.
7. Cover with plastic wrap; refrigerate several hours or overnight.
8. Garnish with whipped topping before serving.
9. Store leftover pie in the refrigerator for up to 6 servings.
